jobs.description:

jobs.title: Gabriele Consulting Group - Senior Business Analyst / IT Project Manager
jobs.description:
Gabriele Consulting Group is now hiring an early to mid-career Senior Business Analyst / Project Manager to support long-term projects for our clients. This is a great opportunity for someone who has 5 to 7 years of post-graduate experience in business analysis, project management, and/or management consulting.

If you have less than 5 years of experience, please see our job posting for a Business Analyst / Project Manager that requires only 2 years of experience, which can include internships and relevant experience gained during college.

jobs.title: Lead System Analyst
jobs.description:
About the position

The Lead System Analyst will lead project staff and subject matter experts in the planning and implementation of project and sub-project work efforts. This role involves leading, coordinating, facilitating, and participating in cross-functional teams to plan and complete complex corporate projects. jobs.description:
About the position

Project Ignite is a large-scale enterprise transformation program uniting 20+ operating companies onto a single Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations and Project Operations platform. We are building a deployment factory designed to roll out several entities per year — from common-stack migrations to mid-complexity entities with distinct operational models, service delivery structures, and customer-facing workflows.
